system.flavor: The stomp of a foot or the slap of a palm is magnified a hundred fold into rumbling death.
system.effect:
Attack: 2 damage. On hit: +2d6
Area Effect: 2 damage
On hit one, (4+) two, or (6+) three height 1 boulder objects in free space anywhere in the area effect after the attack resolves.
Dominant may create a burst 2 (target) area effect centered on your attack target, extending the total area effect.
